title: Sales Manager Vacancy at My Home Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at My Home Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
